# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Gentleman’s Chair
A barber shop business looking to establish an online presence through a promotional landing page. No additional details about the shop's unique identity, atmosphere, or specialties have been provided yet.

## Target Audience
- Young Professional Men
- Grooming Enthusiasts
- Beard Care Advocates

## Industry
grooming & personal care
